description: End-to-end evidence audit for Paper 7. Expensive RL models are not retrained; the script validates the recorded data-to-result chain and classifies each manuscript claim by evidence level.

paired_slope_test.interpretation_boundary: Seed evaluations are paired by seed; use this exact sign-flip randomization result rather than independent-sample Mann-Whitney wording for calibration effects.

reward_scaling_comparator.interpretation: pre-specified observational alpha is compared against ordinary heuristic reward scaling and the unscaled learned reward

reward_specification.canonical_equation: reward = slope_weight * slope_delta + cont_weight * cont_delta + baimu_weight * baimu_area_delta + baimu_bonus * baimu_new_count + I(baimu_area_delta < 0) * baimu_area_penalty * baimu_area_delta - I(completed_swaps <= 0) * no_swap_penalty

terms.interpretation: higher baimu area change increases reward
new baimu count contributes a positive bonus
negative baimu area change receives an additional penalty
zero-swap or invalid actions lose a fixed reward amount

reward_specification.interpretation_boundary: Weight replay is fixed-policy sensitivity on recorded action sequences; it is not retraining under each reward setting.

reward_weight_sensitivity.interpretation: fixed-policy reward-component replay; supports reward preference analysis but does not prove retrained-policy robustness under every weight setting

planning_significance.interpretation: planning outcomes include slope, contiguity, baimu, reward, budget, and available action-concentration diagnostics

transition_rollout.interpretation: supports learned-environment training as an approximate surrogate; final policy outcomes still require real-environment evaluation

policy_induced_diagnostics.interpretation: trained-policy actions induce states close to the recorded trajectory support and retain high action-mask agreement; final outcomes are still measured in the real parcel-simulation environment

calibration.interpretation: observational treatment-effect-informed reward regularization; not definitive causal identification

bishan_non_learning_baselines.interpretation: strong local non-learning rules do not match the calibrated learned policy under the Bishan real-environment evaluation

dongxing_dynamic.interpretation: external data, action-space, and dynamic non-RL feasibility; not learned-policy transfer

dongxing_rl_lite.interpretation: external slope-only learned block-selection actionability; not full cross-county learned-policy transfer and not Bishan full-reward validation

dongxing_full_baselines.interpretation: Dongxing full real-environment baseline pilot with slope, contiguity, baimu, and scalar reward; not learned-policy transfer and not final statistical superiority evidence

dongxing_full_learned_policy.interpretation: Local Dongxing full-reward learned actionability; not Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer and not learned-transition MBRL.

dongxing_transition_diagnostics.interpretation: Dongxing full real-environment transition learnability diagnostic. Random transition split metrics test local learnability; policy holdout metrics expose generalization limits. This artifact does not train an MBRL policy.

dongxing_trajectory_summary.interpretation: Dongxing full-environment transition diagnostics and trajectory summary; supports local learnability but not transfer claims.

transition_diagnostics.interpretation: Dongxing full-environment transition diagnostics and trajectory summary; supports local learnability but not transfer claims.

full_model_based_policy.description: Dongxing one-step learned transition/reward model-based action selection evaluated in the full real environment.
full_model_based_policy.claim_boundary: Local Dongxing one-step model-based action selection; this is not cross-county policy transfer and not multi-step MBRL planning.

model_based_optimization.description: Dongxing one-step model-based scoring-grid optimization with separate selection and held-out evaluation seeds.
model_based_optimization.claim_boundary: Local Dongxing one-step model-based scoring optimization with held-out evaluation; not cross-county transfer and not multi-step MBRL.

scenario_robustness.description: Dongxing scenario-based robustness evaluation with a scenario-robust linear learned-environment planner.
scenario_robustness.claim_boundary: Scenario-based Dongxing robustness for local learned-environment planning; deterministic Dongxing seed repetitions are not treated as independent replications, and this is not direct Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer.

dongxing_mbrl_results.interpretation: Local Dongxing transition-model MBRL evidence bundles one-step model-based policy evaluation, held-out scoring optimization, and multi-step learned-environment policy optimization; not direct cross-county policy transfer.

dongxing_scenario_robustness.claim_boundary: Scenario-based Dongxing robustness for local learned-environment planning; deterministic Dongxing seed repetitions are not treated as independent replications, and this is not direct Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer.

transfer_finetune_results.interpretation: Bishan and Dongxing use incompatible observation and action dimensions, so direct policy transfer is structurally invalid; only adapter-based representation or model transfer would be meaningful.

dongxing_full_model_based_policy.interpretation: Local Dongxing one-step model-based action selection; this is not cross-county policy transfer and not multi-step MBRL planning.

dongxing_model_based_optimization.interpretation: Local Dongxing one-step model-based scoring optimization with held-out evaluation; not cross-county transfer and not multi-step MBRL.

dongxing_multistep_mbrl_policy.interpretation: Local Dongxing multi-step learned-environment policy optimization; final metrics are evaluated in the full real environment. This is not direct Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer.

trajectory_source_ablation.interpretation: Source composition is treated as a robustness factor for the learned transition model; held-out rollout errors are compared across random, greedy, and mixed training data sources.

claim_scope.claim: Bishan model-based policies are trained in a learned environment and evaluated in the real parcel-simulation environment.
The calibration factor improves learned-environment policy training.
claim_scope.interpretation: observational treatment-effect-informed reward regularization; not definitive causal identification

claim_scope.claim: The learned transition model can be used as an approximate training surrogate.
claim_scope.interpretation: supports learned-environment training as an approximate surrogate; final policy outcomes still require real-environment evaluation

claim_scope.claim: The trained learned-environment policy remains evaluable under synchronized learned-vs-real rollouts.
claim_scope.interpretation: trained-policy actions induce states close to the recorded trajectory support and retain high action-mask agreement; final outcomes are still measured in the real parcel-simulation environment

claim_scope.claim: Trajectory-source composition changes the robustness of the learned transition model.
claim_scope.interpretation: Source composition is treated as a robustness factor for the learned transition model; held-out rollout errors are compared across random, greedy, and mixed training data sources.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing supports an external-county local full-reward counterpart.
claim_scope.interpretation: external full-reward local counterpart evidence on Dongxing; full baselines, a local learned policy, one-step and multi-step model-based policy optimization, and held-out scoring optimization are tested locally. Direct Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer remains structurally invalid.

claim_scope.claim: The reward function has been tested through fixed-policy component replay across alternative weight settings.
claim_scope.interpretation: fixed-policy reward-component replay; supports reward preference analysis but does not prove retrained-policy robustness under every weight setting

claim_scope.claim: The scalar reward function is exported as a canonical machine-readable specification.
claim_scope.interpretation: Weight replay is fixed-policy sensitivity on recorded action sequences; it is not retraining under each reward setting.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing supports full multi-objective real-environment baseline evaluation.
claim_scope.interpretation: Dongxing full real-environment baseline pilot with slope, contiguity, baimu, and scalar reward; not learned-policy transfer and not final statistical superiority evidence

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing supports local full-reward learned-policy actionability.
claim_scope.interpretation: Local Dongxing full-reward learned actionability; not Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer and not learned-transition MBRL.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing supports local full-environment transition learnability diagnostics.
claim_scope.interpretation: Dongxing full real-environment transition learnability diagnostic. Random transition split metrics test local learnability; policy holdout metrics expose generalization limits. This artifact does not train an MBRL policy.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing full-environment trajectory evidence has been summarized for local learnability analysis.
claim_scope.interpretation: Dongxing full-environment transition diagnostics and trajectory summary; supports local learnability but not transfer claims.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing local MBRL evidence bundles transition diagnostics, one-step model-based policy evaluation, held-out scoring optimization, and multi-step learned-environment policy optimization.
claim_scope.interpretation: Local Dongxing transition-model MBRL evidence bundles one-step model-based policy evaluation, held-out scoring optimization, and multi-step learned-environment policy optimization; not direct cross-county policy transfer.

Scenario-based Dongxing robustness for local learned-environment planning; deterministic Dongxing seed repetitions are not treated as independent replications, and this is not direct Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing supports local one-step learned transition/reward model-based action selection in the full real environment.
claim_scope.interpretation: Local Dongxing one-step model-based action selection; this is not cross-county policy transfer and not multi-step MBRL planning.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing supports held-out one-step model-based scoring optimization in the full real environment.
claim_scope.interpretation: Local Dongxing one-step model-based scoring optimization with held-out evaluation; not cross-county transfer and not multi-step MBRL.

claim_scope.claim: Dongxing supports local multi-step learned-environment policy optimization with final full real-environment evaluation.
claim_scope.interpretation: Local Dongxing multi-step learned-environment policy optimization; final metrics are evaluated in the full real environment. This is not direct Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer.

claim_scope.claim: Direct Bishan-to-Dongxing policy transfer is structurally invalid without adapter-level changes.
claim_scope.interpretation: Bishan and Dongxing use incompatible observation and action dimensions, so direct policy transfer is structurally invalid; only adapter-based representation or model transfer would be meaningful.
